[@microsoft/fast-element/templating.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [SourceLifetime](../fast-element.sourcelifetime/index.html)

## SourceLifetime variable

Describes how the source's lifetime relates to its controller's lifetime.

**Signature:**

```typescript
SourceLifetime: Readonly<{
    readonly unknown: undefined;
    readonly coupled: 1;
}>
```
